title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.text:
Today, on the Tokyo Racecourse, Narita Brian is
running in the second race of the Classic Triple
Crown tour—the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I can't believe it's still morning.

Although it's early, the venue is already filling up
with people.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Who do you think's gonna win this year's Derby?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
There's only one choice, isn't there? Narita Brian,
of course. Anyone would think so after the
Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Totally! I wouldn't want to run against someone
like that if I was a racer.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
You can tell she's something else just by looking
at her. There's no doubt the other racers are
afraid. I wouldn't be surprised if some avoided the
race altogether.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What the... What the heck are they talking
about?

It's plain to see just how much of an impact she
made at the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
"Hey, did you see that one racer? She was a total
beast on that final stretch."

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
"You mean Brian, right? I wonder if she'll be at
the Derby too. I just messaged my trainer so we
can talk about it."

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: "Sigh... Narita Brian..."
She's even got the other racers raving about her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Don't let all the noise get to you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Where are we right now?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's right. And you got me here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Have some confidence.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The running techniques you've taught me have
given me a joy I never knew before.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The path you've shown me in challenging the
Classic Triple Crown has made me want to run as
hard as I can.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What is there to be worried about? Nothing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Now, it's about time I head to the paddock. Later.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm really going. Don't you have anything to say?
choice_data_list: Get out there and give it everything you've got!
Get out there and give it everything you've got!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hah. Of course.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here comes Narita Brian! What kind of race is in
store for us today?
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: ...So she's finally here. The stage is set.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
...No way am I gonna lose! My trainer prepared
me for this very moment!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text:
...I'm definitely gonna win!
No matter who I'm up against... I can do it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: (They're exactly right.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(If you decide to enter this race, you have to
believe that you're going to win. Nothing else
matters.)
